extraction_failure.description: WS10 requires a numeric data table with 7 energy values [28, 69, 219, 346, 359, 408, 489] and threshold exploration counts. The extracted content is conceptual prose describing the algorithm, not the numeric table the student filled in. This is a fundamental extraction failure — the wrong page region was read.
extraction_failure.what_was_extracted: Conceptual algorithm descriptions (steps, complexity, midpoint logic)
extraction_failure.what_was_expected: Numeric table: energy values per food item, threshold candidates, left/right counts, MCR per threshold
extraction_failure.impact: Gate 3 and Gate 4 are blocked. Cannot score numeric accuracy without the actual table values.
extraction_failure.recommended_action: Re-extract WS10 with explicit instruction to locate and extract the data table region, not the algorithm explanation text boxes.

items.WS10_B1: Tüm olası eşik değerlerini sırayla deneriz.
items.WS10_B3: En düşük MCR'yi veren eşik seçilir.
items.WS10_B4: Sistematik arama, gözden kaçan değer kalmamasını sağlar.
items.WS10_B5: Veri sıralanır ve her iki komşu değer arasındaki orta nokta eşik adayı olarak alınır.
items.WS10_B6: Bu sayede sonsuz değil sonlu sayıda eşik denenir.
items.WS10_B7: 10 adet farklı değer varsa en fazla 9 eşik adayı olur.
items.WS10_B8: Algoritma O(n log n) karmaşıklığında çalışır çünkü önce sıralama yapılır.

item_schema.note: WS10 has two parts: (1) a data table students fill with energy values, threshold candidates, left/right item counts, and MCR per threshold; (2) conceptual questions about algorithm properties. The extraction captured only the conceptual part. The table part is missing.

expected_table_items.WS10_enerji_values: 7 food items with energy values: 28, 69, 219, 346, 359, 408, 489 kcal
expected_table_items.WS10_optimal_threshold: Answer key: threshold ~408 (between 359 and 489) gives 1 misclassification → MCR=1/7≈0.143, lowest MCR

extracted_conceptual_items.WS10_B1_to_B4: Conceptual description of systematic threshold search steps
extracted_conceptual_items.WS10_B5_to_B7: Explanation of midpoint threshold candidates and finite search space
extracted_conceptual_items.WS10_B8: Algorithmic complexity claim (O(n log n)) — advanced conceptual item

raw_ocr.WS10_B1: Tüm olası eşik değerlerini sırayla deneriz.
raw_ocr.WS10_B3: En düşük MCR'yi veren eşik seçilir.
raw_ocr.WS10_B4: Sistematik arama, gözden kaçan değer kalmamasını sağlar.
raw_ocr.WS10_B5: Veri sıralanır ve her iki komşu değer arasındaki orta nokta eşik adayı olarak alınır.
raw_ocr.WS10_B6: Bu sayede sonsuz değil sonlu sayıda eşik denenir.
raw_ocr.WS10_B7: 10 adet farklı değer varsa en fazla 9 eşik adayı olur.
raw_ocr.WS10_B8: Algoritma O(n log n) karmaşıklığında çalışır çünkü önce sıralama yapılır.
raw_ocr.ws_snapshot: Elif sistematik eşik arama mantığını sözlü olarak doğru açıklamış. B5-B7 özellikle güçlü: aday eşik sayısını ve orta nokta seçimini doğru ifade etmiş. B8'deki karmaşıklık ifadesi kavramsal düzeyde doğru.

gate_2_validation.failure_reason: Extraction failure at Gate 1 — numeric table not captured. Gate 2 cannot validate what was not extracted.
gate_2_validation.conceptual_items_note: The extracted conceptual items (B1-B8) appear to be from WS10's explanation section, not the student's filled table. These cannot substitute for the numeric table assessment.

partial_assessment_of_extracted_content.note: Even though these items are misidentified, their content can be assessed for conceptual quality if we treat them as student-written algorithm descriptions.
partial_assessment_of_extracted_content.B1_B3_quality: Correct 3-step procedure for systematic threshold search
partial_assessment_of_extracted_content.B5_B7_quality: Midpoint candidate logic correctly stated. B7 is correct: n distinct values → at most n-1 threshold candidates.
partial_assessment_of_extracted_content.B8_quality: O(n log n) complexity claim is plausible (due to sorting step) but is beyond expected Acquire-level knowledge. Signals strong conceptual understanding.

warnings: CRITICAL: Numeric table data not extracted. Cannot evaluate student's actual threshold exploration or MCR calculations.
Re-extraction required before Gate 3 can proceed.

gate_3_scoring.blocked_reason: Extraction failure at Gate 1. Numeric table required for scoring is not available.

partial_conceptual_scoring.note: Scoring the extracted conceptual items as a best-effort, with the caveat that these may not correspond to actual WS10 blanks.

WS10_B1_B3.rationale: 3-step description of systematic threshold search is correct: (1) enumerate all thresholds, (2) compute MCR for each, (3) select minimum MCR. This matches the expected algorithm structure.
WS10_B1_B3.evidence_quote: Tüm olası eşik değerlerini sırayla deneriz. Her eşik için MCR hesaplanır. En düşük MCR'yi veren eşik seçilir.

WS10_B4.rationale: Systematic search rationale correctly stated: no value is missed. Shows understanding of why systematic approach is preferred over guessing.
WS10_B4.evidence_quote: Sistematik arama, gözden kaçan değer kalmamasını sağlar.

WS10_B5_B7.rationale: Midpoint logic correctly stated. B7 generalizes correctly: n distinct values → n-1 threshold candidates (max). This shows understanding of the finite search space property.
WS10_B5_B7.evidence_quote: Veri sıralanır ve her iki komşu değer arasındaki orta nokta eşik adayı olarak alınır. 10 adet farklı değer varsa en fazla 9 eşik adayı olur.

WS10_B8.rationale: O(n log n) complexity claim is correct (sort step dominates). This is beyond expected level for Acquire — signals strong conceptual depth. Deepen/Create signal.
WS10_B8.evidence_quote: Algoritma O(n log n) karmaşıklığında çalışır çünkü önce sıralama yapılır.
WS10_B8.flag: beyond_expected_level — complexity analysis not required at Acquire

summary.scoring_note: Conceptual items all full credit — student demonstrates strong algorithmic understanding. BUT numeric table not extracted — cannot verify that student correctly applied the algorithm to the energy dataset. Overall credit blocked pending re-extraction.

Acquire_confirmed_from_conceptual: WS10_B1-B4: Correct description of systematic threshold search procedure — LO3.1.1
Deepen_confirmed_from_conceptual: WS10_B5-B7: Midpoint threshold candidate logic — understanding that finite candidate set exists — LO3.2.1
WS10_B8: O(n log n) complexity analysis — connects sorting step to algorithmic efficiency — LO3.2.2 / LO3.3.1 (algorithm design understanding)

indicators.LO3.2.1: confirmed — finite search space property understood

evidence.caveat: Gate 4 assessment based on conceptual items only. Numeric table verification (applying the algorithm correctly to the energy dataset) is still required for full confirmation.

gate_4_aicft.ws_contribution_to_portfolio: WS10 conceptual items show strong algorithmic understanding beyond Acquire level. Complexity analysis (O(n log n)) is particularly notable — no other WS in the sequence captures this level of algorithmic abstraction. Table verification pending re-extraction.
